Name: Total time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to the final EIC decision (e.g., SW-EIC Accept, SW-EIC Reject) in the review process
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 Cycle Time within the reviewer selection sub-process
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and the end of the case

Name: Average time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and the subsequent Assign a Different Editor or Unassign Editor activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'Assign a Different Editor'

Name: Total time spent in the reminder phase (Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 + Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2) relative to the total reviewer selection time
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'

Name: Minimum time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Average time it takes Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 after the execution of SW-Reviewer Selection is now due
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'

Name: Time to Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 since the SW-Reviewer Unavailable activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'

Name: Average time since the Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and SW-AE Assign Reviewers Challenge Paper are performed in challenge paper variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers Challenge Paper'

Name: Total waiting time to the Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 from the first reviewer invitation in a case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'

Name: Average time for Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 in variants where SW-Reviewer Agreed eventually occurs versus variants where it does not
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'", 'end': '', 'aggregation': 'average', 'group_by': "activity == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'"}"

Name: Average time for Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 compared to the average time for Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'", 'end': '', 'aggregation': 'average', 'group_by': "activity == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'"}"
